privileged_info_summary: The target device IP is definitively 127.0.0.1, as rsyslog is configured during environment setup to forward logs to this local address, automatically registering it in the ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer. The expected display name, description, and location are synthetic input values that the agent is required to enter, which is confirmed by the task description and verifier logic.
